data.name: Subtitle
data.value: Upload saved local recordings to the matching participant folders.

data.name: LocalStorageReadyText
data.value: Recordings are loaded from "{0}". Storage location: {1}

data.name: LocalStorageUnsupported
data.value: This browser cannot read recordings directly from a local device folder.

data.name: LocalStorageNotConfigured
data.value: Choose the local folder that contains the saved analysis video and JSON files.

data.name: LocalStoragePermissionMissing
data.value: The browser needs access to the selected local recording folder again.

data.name: NoLocalRecordings
data.value: No complete analysis recordings were found in the selected folder.

data.name: LocalRecordingsNeedFolderAccess
data.value: The local folder is still selected, but the browser needs access again after reload. Click "Renew access" so the existing video and JSON files can be scanned again.

data.name: LocalRecordingsScanFailed
data.value: The local folder could not be scanned: {0}

data.name: UploadPendingOffline
data.value: Uploads are only available while online.

data.name: UploadQueueUploading
data.value: Upload queue is running. Local files are being uploaded to the matching participant folders.

data.name: UploadQueueNeedsFolder
data.value: Upload queue is waiting for access to the local recording folder.

data.name: UploadQueueOffline
data.value: Upload queue is waiting for an online connection.

data.name: UploadQueueReady
data.value: {0} upload(s) are waiting. Automatic upload is active while this page is open.

data.name: UploadQueueIdleWithRefresh
data.value: Upload queue is empty. Last folder scan: {0:MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss}.

data.name: QueuedRecordingTooLarge
data.value: The local recording is too large to upload.
